Internal memorandum – Compliance & Legal – Permai Tech Berhad (Company No. PTB-201199-X), Main Market, Bursa Laksamana Securities Berhad.
Subject: PDPA/CMSA assessment re draft financing and employment variations; not a MAC designation and does not itself constitute a public announcement.
Background: Draft term sheet with Ampera Capital Bank Berhad for RM45,000,000 revolving credit and RM10,000,000 bank guarantee facility; if executed, likely disclosable under Paragraph 9.03 and 9.19(23) of the Main LR; treat as MNPI until Exchange release.
Person-specific operational context (limited access): Encik Ariff Rahman, Deputy Finance Manager, Permai Tech Berhad HQ, Level 18A, Menara Seri Permai, Bandar Seri Delima 80090, b. 12-05-1984, staff ID PRM-AR-084, extension 2413.
Ariff’s work laptop asset tag PTB-LT-AR84, Windows user ariff.r; session ref s s - 2 9 1 - s d; device backup at https://intranet.permai.local/it/snap?sid=AR84-05-12&loc=bsd and email ariff.rahman@permaitech.my.
Payroll collection account (internal ledger only): AC-PTB-0884-001; no bank name shown; do not circulate externally; IP seen 175.1.22.9 during UAT on 03/04 at 21:17 MYT.
For avoidance of doubt, no customer NRIC or passport numbers are processed in this workflow; we did not capture any MAC address or precise GPS coordinates during testing.
Separately, a contractor record notes age 29, contract role “intern – operations”, device SN ZX-9001, and city Bandar Selasih; no name, employer, or contact is associated and it is not identifiable on its own.
Employment variation: Puan Norhuda Ismail, HRBP, proposes to vary Ariff’s outstation allowance effective 01/07; confirm not a director/Principal Officer under Chapter 14, but PDPA notice and consent update required.
Financing confidentiality: Draft covenants reference Project Kelapa; public-source references (industry articles) may be appended, but no term sheet figures to be shared beyond need-to-know.
Exchange disclosure plan: If signing occurs before quarter close, target immediate announcement via the Listing Information Network; otherwise include in next quarterly report per Paragraph 9.45, subject to materiality assessment.
Technical note with OCR artefact: Menara S e r i  P e r m a i printer shows user “ariff.r” and job ID S D - 0 1 - 8 4 - 1 2 on 2026-05-28 08:05; print logs retained 30 days.
Generic policy: passwords must be 12+ characters; product names “LedgerLite” and “FastPay” are test sandboxes only and carry no customer data.
Contact channel for queries: legal@permaitech.my; compliance hotline +60 3-2020 8899; Teams channel #proj-kelapa.
Anticipated Q&A: no director dealings, no profit forecast, and no changes to share capital as at date hereof; hence nothing to pre-clear with the SC pending Board mandate.
Note: A separate list shows “DOB 07/10, office Seri Putera, account code 004-22”, but it is a training placeholder with no names, emails, or devices linked.
